Entries.Name: Business Kweebec
Entries.Line: I guess it makes sense, though. Peartree's always had a cult riding their roots. They somehow project this unshakeable image of being a 'luxury brand'--

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: Her fingers curl into quotation marks so forcefully it's like she's trying to rip the phloem out of the rival executives' throats.

Line.Text: --scandal after scandal. It's not even true! Have you seen the interface on the latest Raincoat Pro? It's the most unusable, oversimplified garbage-- But, but of course that all these mages are eager to--
